conflict: The Friday return queue demands speed, but one bargain model carries injuries and mnemonic residue that match no renter on file.
consequence: Mira moves from routine detachment to private suspicion that CommonFrame is manufacturing lives inside its discount stock.
must_land_beats: Establish the weekend-body economy through claims work rather than exposition.
Show Mira's fluency with dents, fluids, and residual memory triage.
Introduce the impossible body: undocumented scar, sexual wear, and a childhood image with no claimant.
End with Mira placing the model on administrative hold instead of sending it to pulp.
pressure_source: The Friday return queue demands speed, but one bargain model carries injuries and mnemonic residue that match no renter on file.
state_shift: Mira moves from routine detachment to private suspicion that CommonFrame is manufacturing lives inside its discount stock.
